title: Poop Mod Old
description: Adds tools and armor made from poop
body:
This mod is an almost perfect recreation of the old "Poop Mod".
Adds new tools, armor, blocks, special paper and a toilet.

 

To get special ingots with which you can make tools or armor, you need to create toilet paper, which, holding in the main hand, you sneak and click right on the toilet filled with water, then you will get a special paper from which you can create a block to burn through to a bar.
